description_long: This is a life-sized adult human figure with a well-proportioned, athletic build and a natural, relaxed stance. The arms are slightly extended away from the body, and the legs are spaced apart, giving a balanced and stable posture. The figure features a defined head with medium-length, tousled hair that adds a sense of realism and individuality. The silhouette suggests the presence of standard urban clothing, though specific garment details are not visible in the silhouette. The overall form is anatomically accurate, with clear definition of limbs, torso, and head, suitable for representing a pedestrian in a city environment. The figure is designed to blend seamlessly into urban scenes, such as sidewalks, parks, or crosswalks.
description: A realistic adult human figure in a relaxed, upright stance with medium-length tousled hair and an athletic build, suitable for urban pedestrian scenes.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full face, chest, and front of the legs and arms, with hair silhouette visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile view highlighting the side of the head, torso, and the outline of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, arms, and legs, with hair falling naturally.
description_view_3: Right side profile view similar to the left, showing the side of the head, torso, and limbs.
